posts.headline: How to Plan a Paver Patio That Lasts
posts.meta_title: How to Plan a Paver Patio | Example Contractor
posts.description: A practical guide to planning a durable paver patio for Virginia Beach homes.
posts.excerpt: From base preparation to material choices, here is how we help homeowners plan patios that handle coastal weather and heavy use.
posts.content:
Planning a paver patio starts with drainage, base depth and traffic patterns. We walk every client through material options, layout and long-term maintenance before the first stone is set.

Coastal Virginia soils and rainfall make a compacted base and edge restraint essential. A well-planned patio stays level and attractive for years.
posts.author: Example Masonry Team

posts.headline: Retaining Wall Drainage Basics
posts.description: Why drainage is the most important part of a long-lasting retaining wall.
posts.excerpt: Most wall failures start with water. Learn the drainage details we build into every retaining wall project.
posts.content:
Water pressure is the silent enemy of retaining walls. We design gravel backfill, perforated pipe and weep paths so hydrostatic pressure never builds behind the wall face.

If you see leaning, bulging or wet spots, schedule an inspection before the problem becomes a rebuild.
posts.image_alt: Retaining wall with visible drainage stone
posts.author: Example Masonry Team
